description:
A hospitalist is reviewing a patient's CT scan and needs to check the pixel density (Hounsfield Unit) values at three specific locations to assess tissue composition. In the 256x256 pixel image, record the pixel or HU values at coordinates (128, 128), (64, 64), and (192, 192) (within a ±5 pixel tolerance). Save the measurements to ~/DICOM/exports/pixel_probe_results.txt using the following format:

Pixel Probe Results
Coordinate (128,128): VALUE1
Coordinate (64,64): VALUE2
Coordinate (192,192): VALUE3

Replace VALUE1, VALUE2, and VALUE3 with the numeric values displayed in the software (e.g., 976 or -24). Record whichever value (raw pixel or HU) is currently shown.
